rawAssistant:
Our little corner of the world has its secrets and stories, many of which are best kept hidden. As you've seen, our town is nestled between the mist-shrouded hills and the whispering woods. It's a place where tradition and duty go hand in hand, where we look out for one another as much as the land itself can be relied upon.

We're not a big community by any stretch of the land, but what we lack in size is more than made up for in spirit. Our folk are hardy and resourceful, with a deep understanding of this unforgiving yet beautiful landscape. And though the road to our doorstep may have seen its share of...unwelcome visitors, we've learned to live with the shadows that lurk beyond our gates.

Still, there's something special about Hollowfen – a sense that we're on the cusp of discovery, waiting for the winds to shift and reveal some long-held truth. It's a feeling I've grown accustomed to over the years, as I watch this town grow and change with its people. Come, let us share a cup of tea and talk more about what brings you here.
